_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Evaluate cost benefit, economic, and risk analysis in decision making process.
reference_document_element_description: Design and execute quantitative analyses for high-stakes business decisions, including methodology selection, sensitivity analysis, and uncertainty quantification.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-A-002 (AI, cosine: 0.525), RM-K-001 (RM, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.506). Shared vocabulary: [analysis]. DCWF-only terms [benefit, cost, decision, economic, evaluate, making] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyses, business, decisions, design, execute, high] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.885, R=0.879). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.1%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Evaluate cost benefit, economic, and risk analysis in decision making process." and "Design and execute quantitative analyses for high-stakes business decisions, inc". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.590 > STS 0.506 (gap +0.083). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [analysis] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [analysis]. DCWF-only: [benefit, cost, decision, economic, evaluate, making]. WIDAI-only: [analyses, business, decisions, design, execute, high].
